svg.text: Each project is a layer. Build them in order.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Chi tiết architecture cho Project 1: Clinic Appointment Booking System')
g.text: P1 — Clinic appointment booking
NestJS REST API · Next.js dashboard · Postgres schema design
Auth (JWT + refresh) · Role: patient / doctor / admin · Booking state machine
Week 1–4

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Chi tiết architecture cho Project 2: Staff and Shift Management Dashboard')
g.text: P2 — Staff & shift management dashboard
Complex RBAC (Casl/custom guards) · Scheduling engine · Audit logs
Real-time: WebSocket gateway (NestJS) · Shift notifications · TanStack Table
Week 1–4

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Chi tiết architecture cho Project 3: Telemedicine and Realtime Notification Platform')
g.text: P3 — Telemedicine & notification platform
WebSocket rooms · WebRTC signaling server · Push notification service
Event-driven: BullMQ queues · Email/SMS adapter · Multi-tenant isolation
Week 1–4

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Chi tiết architecture cho Project 4: Patient Portal and Strapi CMS')
g.text: P4 — Patient portal & Strapi CMS
Strapi custom plugin · Content types: articles, FAQs, consent forms
Member web app (Next.js App Router) · Medical record viewer · File upload
Week 1–4

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Chi tiết architecture cho Project 5: Multi-Clinic SaaS Platform — full system integration')
g.text: P5 — Multi-clinic SaaS platform ← full system
Tenant provisioning · Subscription billing (Stripe) · Per-tenant config
API gateway · Feature flags · Observability (logs, metrics, tracing)
Integrates: P1 booking + P2 staff + P3 realtime + P4 CMS + portal
Boss level

svg.text: Click any project to explore architecture details
